overview: Smart Resource Allocation Framework — a professional monitoring dashboard with ML-driven scheduling decisions, adaptive policy override, and simulation mode. Tracks CPU, memory, process queues and dynamically selects between Round Robin, Shortest Job First, and Priority scheduling algorithms.
features: Real-time monitoring dashboard with CPU, memory, I/O, and process count charts
ML decision engine selecting between Round Robin, SJF, and Priority scheduling
Greedy prioritization with conflict resolution scoring
Adaptive policy override that forces Round Robin on throughput degradation
Process simulation mode with Poisson arrivals and log-normal burst times
Gantt chart of process execution timeline
Performance KPI dashboard with 5 target metrics
